ValidationRule.description: The Contract Job Item field is required if billable before moving to Assigned
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED( Driver_Status__c ), ISPICKVAL(Driver_Status__c, 'Assigned'), ISBLANK( Configuration__c ), Transport_Job__r.Billable__c )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: If Billable, the Contract Job Item field is required before moving to Assigned.
